plugins.name: marshal
plugins.description: Drive a fleet of headless coding agents (Cursor, OpenCode, Codex, Antigravity, Claude Code, Command Code) from one driver: parallel git-worktree isolation, per-provider cost tracking, and measured routing benchmarks. Bundles the marshal-orchestrate, marshal-benchmark, marshal-workflow, marshal-review-gate, and marshal-plan-consensus skills and the Marshal MCP server (see docs/mcp-tools.md; multi-workspace).
